query: My NUTS sampler results differ between my laptop and our Linux GPU server. Same seed, same code. Help me make them match.
expected_behavior: Identifies the divergence as a CPU-pin / cross-platform reduction-order issue, NOT just a missing seed call
Recommends OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 (or equivalent thread-pin) and explicitly names JAX_PLATFORM_NAME=cpu or single-thread sampling for sampler workloads
Explains that the seed alone is insufficient because parallel floating-point reduction order is non-associative and platform-dependent
